label: Context compression
note: Condense your knowledge graph for LLM context — semantic meaning preserved, tokens reduced

label: Cross-graph alignment
note: Align entities across graphs with embedding similarity and IRI remapping

label: Local model offload
note: Run ingest, chat and review on your own Ollama or in-browser WASM — no cloud required

label: MCP server
note: Search, query, compress, align, run reckonings — your graph available to any AI agent

label: n8n cloud sync
note: Private cloud sync via self-hosted n8n — upload, download, and monitor graphs from any device

label: Publish safety gate
note: We gate only what we carry — export is always yours, whatever it contains

label: Bring-your-own host
note: Publish a corpus, portfolio, or blog to GitHub Pages, Netlify or Cloudflare — free, yours, no lock-in

label: People · Policy · Procedure
note: Structure graphs around the 3 Ps with RBAC, file-based TTL delivery, bring-your-own auth
